org.siprop.v2.core.messge
Interface Message

All Superinterfaces:
java.lang.Cloneable, java.io.Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
B2BUAControlMessage, B2BUAInfo, ControlMessage, FlatMessage, Info, MessageContextInfo, MessageContextPacket, Packet, StackControlMessage, TransactionInfo, TransportControlMessage, UAControlMessage, UAInfo
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractControlMessage, AbstractFlatMessage, AbstractInfo, B2BUAControlMessageImpl, DefaultSIPB2BUAInfo, DefaultSIPUAInfo, FlatSIPMessage, MessageContextInfoImpl, MessageContextPacketImpl, MessageRouterControlMessage, StackControlMessageImpl, TransactionInfoImpl, UAControlMessageImpl
public interface Message
extends java.lang.Cloneable, java.io.Serializable

This interface is a marker class which shows a message.

Author:
noritsuna
